project.name: spar-framework
project.purpose: Standalone deterministic admissibility-review framework extracted from TOE
project.canonical_statement: SPAR Framework is a domain-agnostic admissibility-review kernel. It separates anchor checks, interpretation-scope checks, and maturity-state checks, while delegating domain-specific contracts to adapter packages.

design_invariants.label: deterministic-core
design_invariants.statement: The framework core must remain deterministic. Free-form generative judging is not part of the core review kernel.

design_invariants.label: snapshot-emission
design_invariants.statement: Registry-backed snapshots are part of the runtime result surface, not optional documentation.

design_invariants.label: domain-adapter-boundary
design_invariants.statement: Analytical anchors and domain-specific admissibility contracts belong to adapters, not the framework core.

operation_meta.objective: Institutional memory for standalone SPAR framework extraction.
operation_meta.invocation_notes: Primary invocation via mica.yaml and README/start-here path.
operation_meta.bootstrap_note: Initialized as a standalone extraction target from Flamehaven-TOE.
